title: Sitnasuak Native Corporation Launches New MySitnasuak App
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is excited to share that their new MySitnasuak App is now available for both Apple & Android users! The MySitnasuak Mobile App will provide Shareholders access to view and manage Shareholder information, stay connected with us on important news and updates as well...

title: Video: Alaska Wilderness League Calls on Biden to Stop Climate Disaster
summary: “If you care about climate, then you need to care about Willow,” video call-to-action declares Washington, D.C. – Alaska Wilderness League, through a video, is calling on President Biden to stop ConocoPhillips’ massive Willow proposal, which would industrialize the western Arctic. title: Use It or Lose It: Conflicting Land Uses in the Arctic – Infographic
summary: In the Arctic, a multitude of land uses compete for space. Climate change impacts the access to natural resources and land. The post Use It or Lose It: Conflicting Land Uses in the Arctic – Infographic appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
